architecture.summary: No architecture changes - this is a text substitution across 5 template files. Canonical format: sw:do (namespace:command without leading slash)

integrations.summary: Affects 49 AI tool integrations. AGENTS.md template updated for all tools. CLAUDE.md keeps /sw: format. agents-md-compiler.ts eliminates orphaned /specweave. format. No API changes.

ui-ux.summary: No UI changes. Documentation-only change. Users see sw:do instead of /sw:do in AGENTS.md and README. How to Invoke table guides per-tool invocation.

performance.summary: No performance impact. Pure text substitutions in template files. No runtime code changes.

security.summary: No security implications. Text formatting changes only. No secrets, auth, or data handling affected.

edge-cases.summary: Edge cases covered by brainstorm: Claude-specific columns in AGENTS.md keep /sw: format. Existing user projects with old format unaffected (specweave update-instructions handles smart merge). SKILL.md files already clean - not in scope.
